name: The Ultimate Butter Tart
recipeIngredient: Pastry for double crust pie: 1 cup
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the pastry by rolling it out thinly on a floured surface.
2. Cut into rounds using a 4-inch round cutter and fit them into medium-sized muffin cups.
3. In a bowl, combine all ingredients except raisins and mix well.
4. Divide the raisins evenly among the pastry shells.
5. Fill each shell about 2/3 full with the syrup mixture.
6. Bake on the bottom shelf of the oven at 425°F for 12 to 15 minutes, or until set. Do not overbake; overbaking makes them runnier.
7. Cool on a wire rack before removing from the pans.
SERVINGS: 12
